stimulus: Mwindo Epic is a Nyanga oral poem traditionally chanted in the eastern forests of the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Composed in verses passed down through generations of bards, ______blank had been exiled by his own father but later returned to claim his rightful place among the chiefs of the kingdom.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

answerOptions.content: the hero, Mwindo, whose adventures fill the Mwindo Epic,
there was a hero, Mwindo, who in the Mwindo Epic
the Mwindo Epic recounts the deeds of Mwindo, a hero who

rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. The modifier “Composed in verses passed down through generations of bards” is describing the poem “Mwindo Epic.” Modifiers need to be next to the subjects they describe, so “Mwindo Epic” needs to be the first noun phrase after the comma.

Choice A is incorrect. This doesn’t complete the text in a way that conforms to the conventions of Standard English. The modifier illogically describes the hero as composed in verses. Choice B is incorrect. The modifier illogically describes “there was a hero” as composed in verses, and the construction is awkward. Choice D is incorrect. The modifier illogically describes Mwindo himself as composed in verses, when in fact the poem is what was composed.
